title: Bow Serving Plate Merry Christmas Festive Oval Ceramic Platter with Red Ribbon & Holly Design Holiday Tableware for Christmas Dining, Snacks & Party Serving
features: Elegant white ceramic plate featuring red bows, holly accents, and the message “Merry Christmas”, perfect for seasonal celebrations.
Spacious oval-shaped platter, ideal for serving roasts, desserts, appetisers, and festive treats at Christmas gatherings.
Made from durable, high-quality ceramic with a glossy glaze finish that resists stains and scratches.
Dimensions: Width 42cm x Depth 4cm x Length 28cm
description: Bow ‘Merry Christmas’ Serving Plate — a perfect addition to your holiday tableware collection. Crafted from durable ceramic, it features a festive design with red bows, holly details, and the warm “Merry Christmas” slogan. Its large oval shape makes it ideal for serving everything from roasted vegetables and meats to festive cakes and snacks. Add a cheerful, elegant touch to your dining experience this Christmas!
